instruction:
Two random samples are selected from two independent populations. A summary of the samples sizes and sample means is given below:
\begin{array}{ll} n_1=47, & \bar{x}_1=56.2 \\ n_2=46, & \bar{x}_2=77.2 \\ \end{array} If the 95.5\% confidence interval for the difference $\mu_1-\mu_2$ of the means is (-24.4421,-17.5579), what is the value of the pooled variance estimator? (You may assume equal population variances.) Pooled Variance Estimator=[ANS]
